cliff.notes: 4,4,4 segments + displacement 2.0 = coarser facets. 3 new foreground rocks + waterline mass add imposing silhouette depth

ocean.notes: Horizon plane at z=-45 color #3a8070 creates lighter-teal depth gradient. 25 foam patches (was 6). Wave amplitude tuned.

sky.notes: 14 clouds (was 8), z range -32 to -80, rx/rz tilt per cloud, 2 wispy high-altitude planes h=0.3, slow x-drift animation 0.002/frame, base color #1e2535 darker

improvements_applied: sky: 14 cloud planes (was 8), z-depth -32 to -80, per-cloud rx/rz rotation
sky: slow x-drift animation per cloud (0.002+i*0.0002 units/frame, wraps at x=60)
sky: darker base #1e2535, clouds range #2d3545 to #6a7585
ocean: second horizon plane at z=-45, y=-2, color #3a8070 (lighter teal for depth gradient)
ocean: foam patches expanded from 6 to 25 CircleGeometry patches
cliff: BoxGeometry segments upgraded from 2,2,2 to 4,4,4 on all masses
cliff: vertex displacement amplitude 2.0 (was 1.2) on main body
cliff: 3 additional foreground rock masses (#2a2820 dark) for depth layering
cliff: large waterline rock at y=-1 for partial-submersion silhouette
remaining_gaps: tower: could add weather-worn texture variation via vertex color or emissive accent
vegetation: dark conifers could benefit from 1-2 wind sway cycles
ocean: real-time foam Y-animation not yet implemented (static patches drift in spray only)
next_cycle_recommendations: Add subtle fog density increase toward horizon (FogExp2 density 0.012→0.018 at z<-40)
Animate foam patch Y positions slightly (±0.15 sinusoidal per patch offset)
Add distant cliff silhouette geometry at z=-90 for extreme atmospheric depth
